params.prompt: Photorealistic editorial interior reference photograph of a Taste. Focus tightly on: kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, smoked oak open shelving (matching Smoked Oak finish), aged warm brass dome pendant — finish "aged warm brass" (Warm Brass #D99A48) if present, matte dark stone countertop (visible prep surface), muted dark stone or matte black counter for visible prep, aged warm brass small task sconce or pendant (if pendant over island, match dining pendant finish). Styled in japandi aesthetic, warm_neutral palette, soft_ambient lighting. A measured, low-key luxury Japandi interior: deep matte walls and smoked oak joinery warmed by brass accents, natural textiles and a restrained plant presence. Spaces feel intimate and textural with layered ambient light; styling is sparse, family-ready and includes a compact standing work corner. Prioritize calm sightlines between living, dining and kitchen; keep material and color consistency across shared objects. This image is a visual consistency reference — every detail of the featured furniture and fixtures must be clearly visible and precisely rendered. No people. No visible brand logos. Sharp architectural photography. Luxury real estate staging.
